name: Kolhapur Railway Station Area
description: Busy transit hub with reported cases of chain snatching, harassment of women, and suspicious activity near late-night trains.

name: Central Bus Stand (MSRTC)
description: High footfall area with reported incidents of eve-teasing, pickpocketing, and harassment especially during late hours.

name: Rankala Lake Surroundings
description: Isolated zones near the lake have recorded serious crimes at night including assault and kidnapping incidents.

name: Shivaji Peth
description: Dense commercial locality with history of violent crimes, chain snatching, and street harassment reported near market lanes.

name: Mangalwar Peth
description: Congested old city area with narrow lanes, reported for harassment, assault cases, and theft incidents.

name: Tarabai Park Area
description: Park area with reported incidents of eve-teasing and theft, especially in secluded zones after evening hours.

name: Gandhinagar
description: Residential-commercial mix area with moderate crime rate, including petty theft and reported harassment cases.

name: Subhash Nagar
description: Suburban locality with some reported kidnapping and assault cases, considered unsafe during late-night hours.

name: Kasba Bawda
description: Industrial and residential belt with moderate safety concerns, reported harassment and isolated assault cases.

name: Shahupuri
description: Commercial hub with chain-snatching incidents and eve-teasing reported in crowded market zones.

name: Rajarampuri
description: Known residential area with moderate incidents of theft and harassment especially near isolated lanes.

name: Kalamba Area
description: Outer city area with serious crime history including rape and kidnapping cases near isolated roads and outskirts.

name: Ruikar Colony
description: Residential colony with reported chain-snatching, petty theft, and occasional late-night harassment.

name: Laxmipuri
description: Relatively safer area but with isolated reports of theft and street harassment near busy intersections.

name: Mahadwar Road
description: Main road with high pedestrian traffic, reported for harassment and theft incidents, particularly during festivals and crowded hours.

name: Padmaraje Road Area
description: Moderate safety zone, some harassment incidents reported near college zones and bus stops.

name: Jayanti Nagar
description: Outer residential locality with reported kidnapping and assault cases, especially in poorly-lit lanes at night.

name: Udyam Nagar
description: Industrial zone outskirts with serious crime records including murder and rape cases in isolated areas.

name: New Shahupuri
description: Planned residential zone, relatively safer but occasional harassment and snatching near market areas.

name: Nagala Park Area
description: Area near water body with reported assault and harassment incidents, unsafe for women travelling alone at night.
